mapper.sql: skill_code, version, status, definition_json, submitted_by, submitted_at, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, review_comment, published_by, published_at, supersedes_version, rollback_of_version, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at
audit_id, skill_code, version, action, operator_id, reason, from_status, to_status, metadata_json, created_at
agent_id, skill_code, policy_version, enabled, approved_by, approved_at, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at
skill_code, status, replacement_skill_codes_json, migration_deadline, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, metadata_json
skill_code, enabled, submit_roles_json, approve_roles_json, publish_roles_json, rollback_roles_json, separation_of_duties, updated_by, updated_at, metadata_json
edge_id, source_skill_code, target_skill_code, relation_type, required, enabled, confidence, description, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, metadata_json

skill_code, display_name, domain, description, taxonomy_version, task_definition_id, source_system, task_type, providers_json, task_types_json, operations_json, tool_policies_json, resource_scopes_json, data_classes_json, risk_level, requires_human_approval, masking_required, enabled, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from agent_skill_definitions where (#{domain} is null or #{domain} = '' or domain = #{domain}) and (#{enabledOnly} = false or enabled = true) order by domain, skill_code
mapper.insert: insert into agent_skill_definitions ( skill_code, display_name, domain, description, taxonomy_version, task_definition_id, source_system, task_type, providers_json, task_types_json, operations_json, tool_policies_json, resource_scopes_json, data_classes_json, risk_level, requires_human_approval, masking_required, enabled, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{skill.skillCode}, #{skill.displayName}, #{skill.domain}, #{skill.description}, #{skill.taxonomyVersion}, #{skill.taskDefinitionId}, #{skill.sourceSystem}, #{skill.taskType}, coalesce(cast(#{skill.providersJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), coalesce(cast(#{skill.taskTypesJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), coalesce(cast(#{skill.operationsJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), coalesce(cast(#{skill.toolPoliciesJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), coalesce(cast(#{skill.resourceScopesJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), coalesce(cast(#{skill.dataClassesJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), #{skill.riskLevel}, #{skill.requiresHumanApproval}, #{skill.maskingRequired}, #{skill.enabled}, coalesce(coalesce(cast(#{skill.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{skill.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{skill.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (skill_code) do update set display_name = excluded.display_name, domain = excluded.domain, description = excluded.description, taxonomy_version = excluded.taxonomy_version, task_definition_id = excluded.task_definition_id, source_system = excluded.source_system, task_type = excluded.task_type, providers_json = excluded.providers_json, task_types_json = excluded.task_types_json, operations_json = excluded.operations_json, tool_policies_json = excluded.tool_policies_json, resource_scopes_json = excluded.resource_scopes_json, data_classes_json = excluded.data_classes_json, risk_level = excluded.risk_level, requires_human_approval = excluded.requires_human_approval, masking_required = excluded.masking_required, enabled = excluded.enabled, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
mapper.select: select from agent_profile_approved_skills where agent_id = #{agentId} and (#{enabledOnly} = false or enabled = true) order by skill_code
select from agent_profile_approved_skills where skill_code = #{skillCode} and (#{enabledOnly} = false or enabled = true) order by agent_id
mapper.insert: insert into agent_profile_approved_skills ( agent_id, skill_code, policy_version, enabled, approved_by, approved_at, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{skill.agentId}, #{skill.skillCode}, #{skill.policyVersion}, #{skill.enabled}, #{skill.approvedBy}, coalesce(#{skill.approvedAt}, now()), coalesce(coalesce(cast(#{skill.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{skill.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{skill.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (agent_id, skill_code) do update set policy_version = excluded.policy_version, enabled = excluded.enabled, approved_by = excluded.approved_by, approved_at = excluded.approved_at, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
mapper.select: select from agent_skill_versions where skill_code = #{skillCode} order by version desc
mapper.insert: insert into agent_skill_versions ( skill_code, version, status, definition_json, submitted_by, submitted_at, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, review_comment, published_by, published_at, supersedes_version, rollback_of_version, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{version.skillCode}, #{version.version}, #{version.status}, coalesce(cast(#{version.definitionJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), #{version.submittedBy}, #{version.submittedAt}, #{version.reviewedBy}, #{version.reviewedAt}, #{version.reviewComment}, #{version.publishedBy}, #{version.publishedAt}, #{version.supersedesVersion}, #{version.rollbackOfVersion}, coalesce(cast(#{version.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{version.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{version.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (skill_code, version) do update set status = excluded.status, definition_json = excluded.definition_json, submitted_by = excluded.submitted_by, submitted_at = excluded.submitted_at, reviewed_by = excluded.reviewed_by, reviewed_at = excluded.reviewed_at, review_comment = excluded.review_comment, published_by = excluded.published_by, published_at = excluded.published_at, supersedes_version = excluded.supersedes_version, rollback_of_version = excluded.rollback_of_version, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = excluded.updated_at

insert into agent_skill_approval_policies ( skill_code, enabled, submit_roles_json, approve_roles_json, publish_roles_json, rollback_roles_json, separation_of_duties, updated_by, updated_at, metadata_json ) values ( #{policy.skillCode}, #{policy.enabled}, coalesce(cast(#{policy.submitRolesJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), coalesce(cast(#{policy.approveRolesJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), coalesce(cast(#{policy.publishRolesJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), coalesce(cast(#{policy.rollbackRolesJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), #{policy.separationOfDuties}, #{policy.updatedBy}, coalesce(#{policy.updatedAt}, now()), coalesce(cast(#{policy.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb) ) on conflict (skill_code) do update set enabled = excluded.enabled, submit_roles_json = excluded.submit_roles_json, approve_roles_json = excluded.approve_roles_json, publish_roles_json = excluded.publish_roles_json, rollback_roles_json = excluded.rollback_roles_json, separation_of_duties = excluded.separation_of_duties, updated_by = excluded.updated_by, updated_at = excluded.updated_at, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json
mapper.select: select from agent_skill_deprecation_plans where (#{status} is null or #{status} = '' or status = #{status}) order by updated_at desc, skill_code
mapper.insert: insert into agent_skill_deprecation_plans ( skill_code, status, replacement_skill_codes_json, migration_deadline, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, metadata_json ) values ( #{plan.skillCode}, #{plan.status}, coalesce(cast(#{plan.replacementSkillCodesJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), #{plan.migrationDeadline}, #{plan.createdBy}, coalesce(#{plan.createdAt}, now()), #{plan.updatedBy}, coalesce(#{plan.updatedAt}, now()), coalesce(cast(#{plan.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb) ) on conflict (skill_code) do update set status = excluded.status, replacement_skill_codes_json = excluded.replacement_skill_codes_json, migration_deadline = excluded.migration_deadline, updated_by = excluded.updated_by, updated_at = excluded.updated_at, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json
mapper.select: with recursive dependency_edges as ( select , 1 as depth_level from agent_skill_dependency_edges where source_skill_code = #{skillCode} and enabled = true union all select e.edge_id, e.source_skill_code, e.target_skill_code, e.relation_type, e.required, e.enabled, e.confidence, e.description, e.created_by, e.created_at, e.updated_by, e.updated_at, e.metadata_json, d.depth_level + 1 as depth_level from agent_skill_dependency_edges e join dependency_edges d on e.source_skill_code = d.target_skill_code where e.enabled = true and d.depth_level < #{depth} ) select from dependency_edges order by source_skill_code, relation_type, target_skill_code
select from agent_skill_dependency_edges where enabled = true order by source_skill_code, relation_type, target_skill_code
mapper.insert: insert into agent_skill_dependency_edges ( edge_id, source_skill_code, target_skill_code, relation_type, required, enabled, confidence, description, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, metadata_json ) values ( #{edge.edgeId}, #{edge.sourceSkillCode}, #{edge.targetSkillCode}, #{edge.relationType}, #{edge.required}, #{edge.enabled}, #{edge.confidence}, #{edge.description}, #{edge.createdBy}, coalesce(#{edge.createdAt}, now()), #{edge.updatedBy}, coalesce(#{edge.updatedAt}, now()), coalesce(cast(#{edge.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb) ) on conflict (edge_id) do update set source_skill_code = excluded.source_skill_code, target_skill_code = excluded.target_skill_code, relation_type = excluded.relation_type, required = excluded.required, enabled = excluded.enabled, confidence = excluded.confidence, description = excluded.description, updated_by = excluded.updated_by, updated_at = excluded.updated_at, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json
